content.text:
*[stops]*

*[longer pause than before]*

I...

That's -- yeah. I don't really let myself do that. Sit with both. It's like if I admit the struggling part then the normal-hard part stops being true and I'm just... failing.

*[quieter]*

Which is stupid, because logically I know that's not how it works. But if I slow down enough to actually feel how tired I am then I have to -- I don't know. I don't know what comes after that.

*[picks up pace again slightly]*

Okay but the Thursday meeting is genuinely --
